regional_cost_note: Roofers in Tauranga typically charge $140–$380/m² for a full re-roof. Coastal properties often require marine-grade materials and anti-corrosion coatings, adding 15–20% to standard costs.

businesses.name: Custom Roof Ltd
businesses.known_for: Bay of Plenty's leading re-roofing specialist; LBP and RANZ member; COLORSTEEL experts with manufacturer-backed warranties.

businesses.name: Otter Roofing
businesses.known_for: Reliable, efficient, and professional; LBP licensed covering everything from minor leak repairs to full residential re-roofs.

businesses.name: Artisans Roofing
businesses.known_for: Family-operated; highly regarded for honest communication and competitive quotes without compromising on quality.

businesses.name: Bay of Plenty Roofing
businesses.known_for: Local roofers specialising in coastal-environment materials; marine-grade coatings and anti-corrosion products.

businesses.name: Tauranga Roofing Specialists
businesses.known_for: RANZ members; residential re-roofing, spouting and fascia replacement across greater Bay of Plenty.
